prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 62.2 kg; Height 154.4 cm; BMI 26.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/86 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.8%; 9 months ago 6.5%; 6 months ago 6.4%; 3 months ago 6.4%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 177mg/dL; 9 months ago 166mg/dL; 6 months ago 163mg/dL; 3 months ago 153mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 60.9kg; 9 months ago 62.1kg; 6 months ago 61.3kg; 3 months ago 57.3kg; current 62.2kg), Height (12 months ago 154.4cm; 9 months ago 154.4cm; 6 months ago 154.4cm; 3 months ago 154.4cm; current 154.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 26.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 88mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 88mmHg; current 86mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 52U/L; 9 months ago 57U/L; 6 months ago 57U/L; 3 months ago 48U/L; current 56U/L), AST (12 months ago 47U/L; 9 months ago 46U/L; 6 months ago 54U/L; 3 months ago 52U/L; current 52U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; current 26mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 1044mg/g; 9 months ago 738mg/g; 6 months ago 1004mg/g; 3 months ago 784mg/g; current 997mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 97mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 113mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 113mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 107mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.9g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
